examples: Common examples include Rhus chinensis, Rhus hypoleuca, Rhus succedanea Alocasia cucullata, Alocasia macrorrhiza, Colocasia esculenta and Excocaria agallocha.
Rhus succedanea L. is a multipurpose fruit tree species, which can be used for landscaping, water and soil conservation, so it have good social benefit, economic benefit and ecosystem benefit.
